TERRA HIGH
Journeys Our approach
Start a conversation ↗

Private travel atelier · Dubai

There are places
you arrive at.
And places you enter.

Unscripted, deeply considered journeys through the Middle East for those who travel to be changed.

Explore↓
Wadi Rum, Jordan
29° 36′ N, 35° 25′ E

01 · The quiet exceptional

Beyond the itinerary,
a sense of belonging.

Terra High is for travelers who value the things that cannot be requested on a booking form: the right key, the first table, a storyteller who grew up beside the ruins.

We make the Middle East feel personal, not packaged. Every journey begins at $100,000 and is shaped around a single question: what would make this stay with you?

Discover our point of view →

A different kind of access

The rarest luxury
is unhurried time.

We design the space around an experience as carefully as the experience itself. A desert camp with nothing on the schedule. A restored house held only for you. A meal that lasts until the stories run out.

Dubai · Riyadh · Muscat · Amman

02 · A select collection

Ways to go deeper.

Starting points, never set paths.

They understood that luxury does not need an audience. It just needs to be felt.
